IColumnSet Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The IColumnSet type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
AdditionalColumns
Returns a set of column names to be loaded from the database which will not be part of the client data model.
ReturnAllColumns
When this flag is set, all columns should be considered selected.
